title: Trump's ballroom obsession worries Republicans
subhed: The costly and monumental real estate project has repeatedly been mentioned in presidential speeches, highlighting the billionaire's disconnect from public concerns. Only 28% of citizens deemed the construction necessary.

title: Cannes: Exiled Russian filmmaker Andrey Zvyagintsev's 'Minotaur' delivers anti-war message through intimate lens
subhed: The 62-year-old filmmaker, now living in France, chose the conflict between his country and Ukraine as the backdrop for his latest film. He depicts the consequences of the war, which he openly condemns, within the realm of married life. Despite his open hatred of Putin's regime, his mere presence at Cannes could draw condemnation from Ukrainian advocacy groups.

title: Ligue 1: PSG defeated by Paris FC ahead of Champions League final
subhed: Paris Saint-Germain lost 2-1 on Sunday ahead of the Champions League final on May 30 against Arsenal. Ousmane Dembélé came off before the half-hour in an apparent injury scare. Coach Luis Enrique said 'it has been a tricky end to the season' for PSG as they prep for 'the biggest match in our history.'

title: Alya Aglan, historian: 'De Gaulle is difficult to interpret; he is himself an actor'
subhed: More than half a century after his death, General de Gaulle continues to inspire filmmakers, cartoonists and comic book authors. In an interview with Le Monde, historian Alya Aglan unpacks the driving forces behind these diverse portrayals.

title: How Corsica's schools became the epicenter of a chess revolution
subhed: In Corsica, chess players began learning the game since they were children, with the island counting 16 times more registered players per capita than the rest of France.

title: Trump, with ambitions for Mars, Canada and Greenland, tries to reclaim frontier myth of pioneer America
